Review Us

At Legacy Dental Clinic, we take pride in the positive experiences shared by our patients. Read what others are saying about their visits with our friendly and knowledgeable South Edmonton, AB dentist and discover why we're considered one of the best dental clinics in South Edmonton, AB.

I am very happy with Dr. Nguyen, and all the staff at her clinic. I have had a hard time working myself up to go to the dentist in the past and I daresay I might even look forward to going now.

My family and I come to Legacy Dental Clinic for many years now and always a great experience.
First L.
August 20, 2025
Dr. Atwal is amazing. She gives me omfort. Very professional. She listen. Makes me feel I am in good hands. Quality of her work is second to none. I am very satisfied. She clearly explain everything to me before start. He kept me informed at each stage. I left the clininc with a big smile. Thank you Dr. Atwal.
Read more
Salah Babiker
10 months ago
Update July 24. Today the team make my day a little bit lighter after struggling with personal stuff. They understood my situation, they listened to me and took a quick action! I will always be grateful with the team, I felt listened and supported in a very human way. I couldn’t be happier with my experience at Legacy Dental with Dr. Atwal and the entire team. They are always punctual, and I really appreciate how clearly they explain every treatment and cost estimate—there are never any surprises. The clinic itself is spotless, and everyone, from the front desk to the dental assistants, is kind and welcoming. This clinic was recommended to me by a close friend, and now I know exactly why. Highly recommend to anyone looking for excellent dental care!
Read more

11 months ago
The staff is always welcoming, kind, and professional. They make every appointment feel very comfortable.
Luis Sanchez Espino
1 year ago
What a great experience! Everyone was so friendly, and made me feel at ease. I highly recommend Legacy Dental.
Karen Hurrel
1 year ago
I have been searching for a dentist for quite some time, and decided to give this place a try. Dr Atwal was incredibly thorough and thoughtful throughout the whole dental process. She explained what was happening with my teeth/gums and made sure I was comfortable throughout the whole appointment. I really appreciated her attention to detail and her kind approach. I will definitely be going here from now on!

Julia Dabbs
1 year ago
Dr.Jennifer nguyen is very good dentist and she’s constantly care of my teeths and gum’s health and very gentle in handling my sensitive tooth 🦷. The place are very clean and organized. The head reception and the other staff are friendly and helpful and always welcoming. Legacy dental clinic is excellent especially in giving care to their patients and details!! Very recommendable to all children and adults with regards to dental hygiene and more.

Friendly and supportive of my choices since they always explain my options. I find the doctors are there to educate and inform about dental hygiene and tooth care. Very informative. Considerate, compassionate care consistently given every time.

I absolutely love everyone that works here. They are very kind and the follow up messages asking how anyone is doing after treatment is such a step above.

Contact Us

Have questions or ready to book an appointment with a trusted South Edmonton, AB dentist? Reach out to Legacy Dental Clinic, one of the best dental clinics in South Edmonton, AB, and our friendly team will be happy to assist you.

We Proudly Serve the Communities of:

  • Ermineskin, AB, Canada

  • Rideau Park, AB, Canada

  • Duggan, AB, Canada

  • Steinhauer, AB, Canada

  • Mill Creek, AB, Canada

  • Allendale, AB, Canada
